title: Diffusion Drawer Project Scope
concept: Defining the task: generating drawing latents conditioned on simple text prompts.

exercises.prompt: What is the goal of the Diffusion Drawer project?

options.text: To create a drawing based on a simple text prompt.
To write a story based on drawings.

exercises.explain: The goal is to generate a drawing from a text prompt.

cards.title: Understanding the Project
cards.body: In this lesson, we will learn about the Diffusion Drawer project, which focuses on creating images based on text prompts.

cards.title: What is Conditioning?
cards.body: Conditioning in this context means using a specific input, like a text prompt, to guide how an image is created.

cards.title: Thinking Like a Chef
cards.body: Imagine a chef who uses a recipe as a guide. Just like the chef uses ingredients to create a dish, we use text prompts to create drawings.

cards.title: Examples of Text Prompts
cards.body: For example, a prompt like 'a sunny beach' can generate a drawing of a beach scene.

cards.title: Myth: Drawing is just for artists
cards.body: Many people think only professional artists can create images. However, our project allows anyone to generate drawings using simple text prompts!

cards.title: Visualizing the Process
cards.body: Here’s how we visualize the task:

exercises.prompt: What is the main task of the Diffusion Drawer project?

options.text: To modify images based on colors.
To generate drawings from text prompts.
To learn about different art styles.

exercises.explain: The main task is to generate drawings based on text prompts.

exercises.prompt: The project focuses on drawing images without any text prompts. Is this true or false?
exercises.explain: It's false because the project specifically uses text prompts to create images.

exercises.prompt: The Diffusion Drawer project is about generating drawing latents conditioned on __________.
exercises.sentence: The Diffusion Drawer project is about generating drawing latents conditioned on simple text prompts.
exercises.explain: The correct term is 'simple text prompts' which guides the drawing generation.

exercises.prompt: Which statement best describes the goal of our project?

options.text: To create images based on text prompts.

exercises.explain: The goal is to create images from text prompts, which is the essence of what we're doing.

exercises.prompt: What does conditioning help us achieve in the Diffusion Drawer project?

options.text: It helps us randomize our drawings.
It allows us to generate images based on specific text inputs.
It enables us to create sound effects for our images.
It teaches us about text formatting.

exercises.explain: Conditioning helps us generate images that are directly related to the text input provided. This is crucial for achieving the intended visual representation.
